body:
This PR addresses the first issue from list of https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/4285

- Combines the `moisture_model` with `microphysics_model` (keeping the `microphysics_model` name). The supported options are: `DryModel`, `EquilibriumMicrophysics0M`, `NonEquilibriumMicrophysics1M`, `NonEquilibriumMicrophysics2M` (to be deleted when P3 is fully functional), `NonEquilibriumMicrophysics2MP3`.

- Separates `SGSQuadrature` from `microphysics_model`. About 50 places require only microphysics information, while only about 10 require quadrature information. This pattern lead to cumbersome unpacking the type to get to base type.
title: Wip on moisture_model and microphysics_model refactor
